mnemonics.title: Notation Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: Big-O Above (upper bound), Omega Below (lower bound), Theta Tight (both bounds)

mnemonics.title: Complexity Order
mnemonics.content: Constant, Logarithmic, Linear, Linearithmic, Quadratic, Cubic, Exponential, Factorial - Can Lions Leap Like Quick Cheetahs Eating Frogs?
